# `kitty-keyboard` sequences

<!-- Generated by `qdb generate reference` from `db/kitty-keyboard.toml`. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Enable Kitty Keyboard Protocol (`kitty.keyboard.enable`)

Progressive enhancement flags are negotiated per session.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI > flags u`
- References: [kitty Keyboard Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/keyboard-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/keyboard_enable.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/keyboard_enable.seq)

## Disable Kitty Keyboard Protocol (`kitty.keyboard.disable`)

Cleanup pair for Kitty keyboard protocol.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI < u`
- References: [kitty Keyboard Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/keyboard-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/keyboard_disable.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/keyboard_disable.seq)

## Pop Kitty Keyboard Protocol Flags (`kitty.keyboard.pop`)

Restores a previous keyboard protocol stack entry.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI < count u`
- References: [kitty Keyboard Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/keyboard-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/keyboard_pop.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/keyboard_pop.seq)

## Kitty Keyboard Event (`kitty.keyboard.event`)

Represents modifiers, event type, alternate keys, and associated text when enabled.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [kitty Keyboard Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/keyboard-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## Kitty Keyboard Release Event (`kitty.keyboard.event_release`)

Covers the event-type subparameter for release reports.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [kitty Keyboard Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/keyboard-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## Kitty Keyboard Event With Enhanced Fields (`kitty.keyboard.event_full`)

Covers alternate key identifiers, key event type, and associated text payload.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [kitty Keyboard Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/keyboard-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## Kitty Keyboard Flags Query (`kitty.keyboard.flags_query`)

Queries the current progressive enhancement flag set.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? u`
- Responds with: `kitty.keyboard.flags_report`
- References: [kitty Keyboard Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/keyboard-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/keyboard_flags_query.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/keyboard_flags_query.seq)
- Conformance: alacritty supported (5); betamax supported (5); kitty supported (5); tmux no-reply; wezterm no-reply

## Kitty Keyboard Flags Report (`kitty.keyboard.flags_report`)

Fixture reports recommended flags value 23.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [kitty Keyboard Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/keyboard-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/kitty_keyboard_flags_report_report_capture_betamax.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/kitty_keyboard_flags_report_report_capture_betamax.seq), [`fixtures/kitty/kitty_keyboard_flags_report_report_capture_kitty.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/kitty_keyboard_flags_report_report_capture_kitty.seq), [`fixtures/kitty/kitty_keyboard_flags_report_report_capture_alacritty.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/kitty_keyboard_flags_report_report_capture_alacritty.seq)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture
